mapper.select: SELECT id,app_id AS appId,role,content,created_at AS createTime,updated_at AS updateTime,is_file AS isFile FROM messages WHERE id=#{id} AND app_id=#{appId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE app_id=#{appId}

SELECT id,app_id AS appId,role,content,created_at AS createTime,updated_at AS updateTime,is_file AS isFile FROM messages WHERE app_id=#{appId} AND (created_at < #{before} OR (created_at = #{before} AND id < #{beforeId})) ORDER BY created_at DESC,id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM messages WHERE app_id=#{appId} AND id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT m.id,m.app_id AS appId,a.user_id AS userId,m.role,m.content,m.created_at AS createTime,m.updated_at AS updateTime,m.is_file AS isFile FROM messages m JOIN apps a ON a.id=m.app_id ORDER BY m.created_at DESC,m.id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages m JOIN apps a ON a.id=m.app_id
